releases.changelog: Renamed Authenticity Gate dimension 'coherence' to 'internal_consistency' across all 6 base framework files. Removed 3 disambiguation notes that are no longer needed. No logic changes -- text substitution only.

Authenticity Gate: Added domain-agnostic binary pass/fail quality gate with 4 dimensions (coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness for purpose) to the harness base framework. Gate runs after domain criteria scoring as a cross-cutting overlay. Dual-side control: generator pre-implementation checklist (prevention) and evaluator post-grading gate (detection). All text uses generic middleware language.

Domain Skills Expansion: Added 3 new domain skills (harness-ba for business_analysis, harness-sa for solution_architecture, harness-ops for ops) following the 10-section pattern. Updated SKILL.md routing table and Domain Profiles table. Verified plugin.json discovery.

Harness Workflow Integrity: Added pre-flight/post-flight guards to all 5 commands, moved release artifacts to project root, added manifest sync, added skill activation checks, added workflow entry integrity invariants.
